palette_hint: Off-white background #F5F3EF, near-black text #1A1A18, accent olive #4A5240, and rust-red #B84C2E for CTAs and badges.
type_style: Headings in Georgia serif, bold weight for product names and section titles; body in system-ui sans-serif at 14-15px, neutral and dense, conveying military utility.
description: Ironveil is a direct-to-consumer tactical and outdoor gear shop selling modular plate carriers, load-bearing vests, gloves, and accessories to civilian preparedness enthusiasts and security professionals.
constraints: Shop page uses a fixed 240px left sidebar with category filters and a scrollable main product grid of 3 columns; sidebar sticks to top on scroll using position:sticky with top:0.

Product detail page uses a two-column layout: left column 55% for images stacked vertically, right column 45% fixed-width with sticky product info panel (position:sticky, top:20px) containing price, size selector table, and add-to-cart button.

Cart page features a two-column layout: left 65% for a dense HTML table listing items (columns: thumbnail, name, SKU, qty, unit price, subtotal), right 35% for an order summary box with shipping tier breakdown.

Account page has a fixed 200px left nav sidebar listing sections (Orders, Saved Gear Lists, Address Book, Payment Methods) with a scrollable right content area; active nav item highlighted with olive #4A5240 left border 4px solid.

All pages share a sticky top navigation bar 56px tall with background #1A1A18, white text, and the Ironveil wordmark left-aligned in Georgia bold; max content width is 1200px centered with 24px horizontal padding.

page_specs.shop: Displays 18 product cards in a 3-column grid with product thumbnail, name, price, and a rust-red 'Add to Cart' button. The left sidebar contains collapsible filter groups for Category (Plate Carriers, Pouches, Gloves, Footwear), Material (500D Cordura, 1000D Nylon, Leather), and Price Range with checkbox inputs; a 'Clear Filters' text link appears at the top of the sidebar in rust-red #B84C2E. A breadcrumb bar sits above the grid showing 'All Gear' and a product count badge.
page_specs.product-detail: Features the Ironveil MK-IV Plate Carrier with three stacked product images on the left (full bleed, 100% column width each) and a sticky right panel showing the product name in Georgia bold 24px, SKU IVC-MK4-RNG, price $289.00, a size selection table (rows: S/M, L/XL, 2XL with in-stock indicators as colored dots), a quantity stepper, and a full-width rust-red Add to Cart button. Below the two-column section is a full-width tabbed specs area showing a dense HTML table with rows for Weight, Material, MOLLE Rows, Cummerbund Type, and Compatible Plates.
page_specs.cart: Shows a cart containing three example items (MK-IV Plate Carrier, MOLLE Admin Pouch, Tactical Rigger Belt) in a table with columns for Item, SKU, Qty (editable input), Unit Price, and Subtotal, each row separated by a 1px #DEDAD4 border. The right summary panel lists subtotal, a shipping tier table (Standard $8.99, Expedited $18.99, Overnight $34.99) with radio selectors, estimated tax, and a bold total; a rust-red 'Proceed to Checkout' button spans the full width of the summary panel.
page_specs.account: The left sidebar lists five nav links; the default active section is Orders, which displays in the right content area a table of past orders with columns for Order #, Date, Items, Total, and Status badge (Shipped in olive, Processing in rust-red). A secondary row below each order expands to show individual line items without JS by using a details/summary HTML element. The Address Book section (visible when that nav item is active) shows two saved addresses in a two-column card grid with an 'Edit' link and a dashed-border 'Add New Address' card.
page_specs.about: A single-column editorial page with a max-width of 760px centered, featuring a bold Georgia heading 'Built for Operators. Trusted by Civilians.' followed by three paragraphs detailing Ironveil's 2014 founding in Boise, Idaho, its use of US-sourced 500D Cordura, and its partnership with veteran-owned workshops. Below the text is a dense three-column stat row showing '10,000+ Units Deployed', 'Lifetime Warranty on Stitching', and 'Ships in 48 Hours' each in a bordered box with olive accent text for the stat number. The page ends with a two-column team section listing founder Marcus Yellen and head of design Priya Caldwell with title and a short bio.
